hero.title: Welcome to Hindu Mandir Stockholm
hero.subtitle: A place for prayer, community, and Indian culture in the heart of Stockholm

sanskritVerse.verse: सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः। सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु मा कश्चिद्दुःखभाग्भवेत्॥
sanskritVerse.translation: May all be happy, may all be free from illness, may all see goodness, may no one suffer

about.title: About the Temple
about.description: Since 1998, Hindu Mandir has protected and furthered the interests of Swedish Hindus. We safeguard the Hindu tradition and lifestyle in Sweden, serving approximately 70,000 Hindus with regular pujas, cultural events, and programs for all ages.

services.title: Mandir Services
services.subtitle: We offer a variety of religious and community services
services.intro: Come and be proud sponsors of Sunday Satsang, Pooja and Preeti Bhoj. Come with your family and friends and seize the opportunity to thank the Almighty for all that he has given us, get blessings and pray for continued peace, health and happiness.
services.dailyPujaDesc: Morning and evening aarti and puja ceremonies held daily at the temple.
services.specialPujaDesc: Personal puja ceremonies for special occasions — namkaran, gruh pravesh, satyanarayan katha, and more.
services.festivalsDesc: We celebrate all major Hindu festivals including Diwali, Holi, Navratri, Janmashtami, and many more.
services.youthProgramsDesc: Cultural and language classes for children and youth to stay connected with their heritage.
services.yogaMeditationDesc: Weekly yoga and meditation sessions open to all community members.
services.communityHallDesc: Our community hall is available for cultural events, celebrations, and community gatherings.
services.pricingSubtitle: The list of services and donations for the temple
services.panditHouseCall: Pandit ji on house call (excl. travel costs)

history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: The journey of Hindu Mandir Society Stockholm
history.intro: Hindu Mandir Society Stockholm was established in 1980 to serve the Indo-Swedish community. A religious, non-profit charity, it aims to meet the spiritual, ritual, ceremonial, and social needs of Hindus in the Stockholm region. Since the temple inauguration in September 1998, it has been the heartbeat of the Hindu community in Sweden.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: Hindu Mandir Society Stockholm ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting the privacy and personal data of our members, visitors, and website users. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Swedish data protection legislation.
privacy.controllerText: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:
privacy.dataCollectText: We may collect and process the following categories of personal data:
privacy.dataCollectItem1: Identity data: first name, last name, date of birth
privacy.dataCollectItem2: Contact data: email address, phone number, postal address
privacy.dataCollectItem3: Membership data: membership type, membership number, payment history
privacy.dataCollectItem4: Donation data: donation amounts, payment references, Swish/Bankgiro transactions
privacy.dataCollectItem5: Event data: event registrations, attendance, volunteer participation
privacy.dataCollectItem6: Communication data: messages sent through our contact form, newsletter subscriptions
privacy.dataCollectItem7: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information (collected automatically when you visit our website)
privacy.dataCollectItem8: Religious affiliation: as a religious organization, we may process data indicating your religious beliefs in connection with your membership or participation in religious activities
privacy.legalBasisText: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds under Article 6 of the GDPR:
privacy.legalBasisConsent: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)): When you subscribe to our newsletter, submit a contact form, or give explicit consent for specific processing activities.
privacy.legalBasisContract: Contract (Art. 6(1)(b)): When processing is necessary for the performance of your membership agreement or to process a donation or bhandara booking you have requested.
privacy.legalBasisLegal: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)): When we are required to retain financial records under Swedish Bokföringslagen (Accounting Act).
privacy.legalBasisLegitimate: Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)): For the administration of our organization, communicating with members, and maintaining the security of our website.
privacy.specialCategoryText: As a registered religious organization (trossamfund), we may process data revealing religious beliefs. This processing is permitted under Article 9(2)(d) of the GDPR, which allows processing by a not-for-profit body with a religious aim, provided that the processing relates solely to members or former members of the organization, or to persons who have regular contact with it in connection with its purposes, and the personal data is not disclosed outside the organization without the consent of the data subjects.
privacy.useText: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
privacy.useItem1: Managing your temple membership and communicating membership-related information
privacy.useItem3: Organizing and managing events, festivals, and religious ceremonies
privacy.useItem4: Managing bhandara bookings and community meals
privacy.useItem5: Sending newsletters and temple updates (only with your consent)
privacy.useItem6: Responding to your enquiries via the contact form
privacy.useItem9: Complying with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal data to third parties. We may share your data in the following limited circumstances:
privacy.sharingItem1: Service providers: We use Firebase (Google Cloud) to host our website and store data. Google processes data in accordance with their data processing terms and GDPR requirements.
privacy.sharingItem2: Payment processors: When you make payments via Swish or Bankgiro, your transaction data is processed by the respective payment service providers.
privacy.sharingItem3: Error tracking: We use Sentry (Functional Software, Inc.) for error monitoring and performance tracking. Sentry may receive technical data such as IP addresses, browser information, and error details to help us identify and fix issues. Sentry processes data in accordance with their privacy policy and GDPR requirements.
privacy.sharingItem4: Legal requirements: We may disclose your data if required by law, for example to the Swedish Tax Agency (Skatteverket) for financial reporting purposes.
privacy.retentionText: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy:
privacy.retentionItem1: Membership data: Retained for the duration of your membership and up to 2 years after membership ends, to allow for re-registration.
privacy.retentionItem2: Financial records (donations, payments): Retained for 7 years as required by the Swedish Bokföringslagen (Accounting Act, Chapter 7, Section 2).
privacy.retentionItem3: Contact form messages: Retained for up to 1 year after the enquiry has been resolved.
privacy.retentionItem4: Newsletter subscriptions: Retained until you unsubscribe.
privacy.retentionItem5: Event registrations: Retained for up to 1 year after the event.
privacy.retentionItem6: Website technical data: Retained for up to 12 months.
privacy.rightsText: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rightsAccess: Right of access: You have the right to request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.rightsRectification: Right to rectification: You have the right to request that we correct any inaccurate personal data.
privacy.rightsErasure: Right to erasure: You have the right to request that we delete your personal data, subject to legal retention obligations.
privacy.rightsRestriction: Right to restriction: You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal data in certain circumstances.
privacy.rightsPortability: Right to data portability: You have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format.
privacy.rightsObjection: Right to object: You have the right to object to the processing of your personal data based on legitimate interests.
privacy.rightsWithdraw: Right to withdraw consent: Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal.
privacy.rightsExercise: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at helenalundhindumandir@gmail.com. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacy.childrenText: We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under the age of 13 without parental consent, in accordance with Swedish law. Family memberships include children under 18, but the membership registration is carried out by a parent or legal guardian. If you believe we have collected data from a child under 13 without appropriate consent, please contact us immediately so we can take action.
privacy.cookiesText: Our website uses cookies to ensure proper functionality. For detailed information about the cookies we use and how to manage them, please see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, wish to exercise your data protection rights, or have a complaint about how we handle your personal data, please contact us:
privacy.contactAddress: Post: Hindu Mandir Society Stockholm, Åkervägen 1, 191 40 Helenelund
privacy.supervisoryText: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten, IMY) if you believe your data protection rights have been violated.
privacy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How Hindu Mandir Stockholm handles your personal data — GDPR compliance

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.introText: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to website owners.
cookiePolicy.whatWeUseText: We strive to use as few cookies as possible. Currently, our website uses the following types of cookies:
cookiePolicy.essentialText: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They include:
cookiePolicy.essentialItem1: Cookie consent preference: Stores your cookie consent choice so we do not ask you repeatedly. (Key: cookie-consent, Duration: 1 year)
cookiePolicy.essentialItem2: Locale preference: Remembers your language selection (Swedish or English).
cookiePolicy.analyticsText: We use Vercel Analytics to understand how visitors use our website. Vercel Analytics is privacy-friendly and does not use cookies for tracking. It collects anonymized usage data to help us improve the site. No personal information is collected or shared with third parties.
cookiePolicy.thirdPartyText: Our website may embed content from third-party services (such as YouTube for live streams). These services may set their own cookies. We have no control over third-party cookies and recommend reviewing their respective cookie policies.
cookiePolicy.manageText: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Here is how to manage cookies in common browsers:
cookiePolicy.manageChrome: Chrome: Settings > Privacy and Security > Cookies and other site data
cookiePolicy.manageFirefox: Firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security > Cookies and Site Data
cookiePolicy.manageSafari: Safari: Preferences > Privacy > Manage Website Data
cookiePolicy.manageEdge: Edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions > Cookies and site data
cookiePolicy.manageNote: Please note that disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of this website.
cookiePolicy.consentText: When you first visit our website, you will be shown a cookie consent banner. You can choose to accept all cookies or use only essential cookies. You can change your preference at any time by clearing your browser cookies and revisiting the site.
cookiePolicy.contactText: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at helenalundhindumandir@gmail.com.
cookiePolicy.changesText: We may update this cookie policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

meta.title: Cookie Policy
meta.description: Information about cookies used on the Hindu Mandir Stockholm website

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to ensure our website works properly and to improve your experience.

dataRequest.title: Data Request
dataRequest.subtitle: Exercise your GDPR rights
dataRequest.intro: Under GDPR, you have the right to request a copy of your personal data or request that we delete your data. Use the form below to submit your request. We will process your request within 30 days.
dataRequest.exportDataDesc: Receive a copy of all personal data we hold about you in a machine-readable format.
dataRequest.deleteDataDesc: Request that we delete all your personal data from our systems (subject to legal retention requirements).
dataRequest.messagePlaceholder: Describe your request or include additional details...
dataRequest.confirmDescription: You are requesting "{type}" for {email}. Please confirm this is your email address by re-typing it below.
dataRequest.confirmEmailMismatch: Email addresses do not match. Please try again.
dataRequest.rateLimited: You have submitted too many requests in this session. Please try again later.
dataRequest.successMessage: Your request has been recorded. We will process your request and contact you within 30 days as required by GDPR.
dataRequest.processingNotice: We process all requests within 30 days as required by GDPR. You will receive an email from us with confirmation and further instructions.
